VULNERABLE: Apache byterange filter DoS State: VULNERABLE IDs: BID:49303 CVE:CVE-2011-3192 The Apache web server is vulnerable to a denial of service attack when numerous overlapping byte ranges are requested. Disclosure date: 2011-08-19 References: https://www.securityfocus.com/bid/49303 https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2011-3192 https://seclists.org/fulldisclosure/2011/Aug/175 https://www.tenable.com/plugins/nessus/55976

table.elem: The Apache web server is vulnerable to a denial of service attack when numerous overlapping byte ranges are requested.

script.output: Couldn't find any stored XSS vulnerabilities.
A Cyber Security Digest by Paulo Bazzo
script.elem: A Cyber Security Digest by Paulo Bazzo
